description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named test-suite that runs on every push to master and develop branches, excluding docs/, and on pull requests to those branches. The workflow has two jobs: test and deploy. The test job runs tests with a matrix of Python versions (3.9, 3.10, 3.11) and testing databases (sqlite3, postgresql, mysql), and the deploy job builds and pushes a Docker image to DockerHub if the repository is evennia/evennia.
